question: Assuming today is Thursday, what is the approximate average energy usage for the entire week (Monday to Sunday)?

options.B: about 17 kWh, based on all seven days
options.C: about 20 kWh, using only days with visible bars
options.D: about 13 kWh, because some days appear to use no energy

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
